1. Go to https://account.microsoft.com/security
2. Click "Change password"
3. Enter your current password
4. Create a new strong password (minimum 12 characters, including uppercase, lowercase, numbers, and symbols)
5. Click "Save"
6. Re-login to all devices with your new password

If you've forgotten your password, click "Can't access your account?" on the login page, verify your identity, and follow the recovery steps. If you're still having issues, contact IT support.

messages.content: Email setup

To set up your email, follow these steps: 

1. Receive a welcome email from the IT Support Team with your Microsoft 365 login URL, company email address, and temporary password.
2. Sign in to Microsoft 365 at https://www.office.com using your company email address and temporary password.
3. Change your temporary password to a new one that meets the password requirements (minimum 12 characters, 1 uppercase letter, 1 lowercase letter, 1 number, and 1 special character).
4. Configure Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA) by installing Microsoft Authenticator on your mobile phone and scanning a QR code.
5. Access Outlook Web Mail at https://outlook.office.com using your company email address and new password.
6. Optionally, configure Outlook Desktop by connecting to your company email address and completing MFA verification.

If you encounter any issues during the setup process, visit the Productivv Ticketing Portal to create a ticket and receive further assistance from an IT Engineer.

messages.content: How to set MFA

To set up Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA), follow these steps:

1. Click Next when prompted for additional security verification.
2. Install Microsoft Authenticator on your mobile phone.
3. Open Microsoft Authenticator and select Add Account, then choose Work or School Account.
4. Select Scan QR Code and scan the QR code displayed on your computer screen.
5. Approve the test notification sent to your mobile device.
6. Click Next to complete MFA setup.

These steps are outlined in Step 4 of the Microsoft 365 Email Setup Procedure in the provided IT documents.

To set up your email, please follow these steps from our Microsoft 365 Email Setup Procedure:

1. **Receive Welcome Email**: You should have received an email from the IT Support Team containing your Microsoft 365 Login URL, Company Email Address, and Temporary Password.

2. **Sign In to Microsoft 365**:
   - Open https://www.office.com
   - Click Sign In.
   - Enter your company email address.
   - Click Next.
   - Enter the temporary password provided.
   - Click Sign In.

3. **Change Temporary Password**:
   - Enter the temporary password.
   - Create a new password (minimum 12 characters, including at least 1 uppercase letter, 1 lowercase letter, 1 number, and 1 special character).
   - Confirm the new password.
   - Click Submit.

4. **Configure Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA)**:
   - Click Next when prompted for additional security verification.
   - Install Microsoft Authenticator on your mobile phone.
   - Open Microsoft Authenticator, add your work or school account, and scan the QR code displayed on your computer screen.
   - Approve the test notification sent to your mobile device.
   - Click Next to complete MFA setup.

5. **Access Outlook Web Mail**:
   - Open https://outlook.office.com
   - Sign in using your company email address and new password.
   - Approve the MFA notification when prompted.

6. **Configure Outlook Desktop (Optional)**:
   - Open Microsoft Outlook.
   - Enter your company email address and click Connect.
   - Enter your password and complete MFA verification.
   - Outlook will automatically configure your mailbox.
   - Click Finish.

If you encounter any issues during this process, please ensure you've followed all the steps correctly. If the problem persists, I'll need some more information to assist you further. 6. Submit the ticket.
